name: Elegant Asparagus Beef Roll with Teriyaki Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the asparagus by boiling, steaming, stir-frying, or microwaving until tender. Remove the tough end and keep the whole spear.
2. Prepare the marinade for the beef by mixing wine, soy sauce, egg white, ginger, cornstarch, garlic, and black pepper.
3. Mix the marinade with the beef slices and refrigerate for at least 10 minutes.
4. To assemble: Take a marinated beef slice and roll it with Inoki mushrooms, Shitake mushrooms, green onion, and steamed asparagus. Secure with a toothpick.
5. Brown the rolls in peanut oil (2 per person) for about 1 minute on each side.
6. Add the braising sauce (Teriyaki and broth) and cover. Cook over medium heat for 3-4 minutes until done.
7. Serve with cooked rice and garnish with pan drippings and Inoki mushrooms.
